div.h2: Deferred Task Queue: Execution Order Within One Event Loop Tick

g.text: PHASE 1 I/O dispatch | Node.js: poll phase (I/O callbacks)
PHASE 2 pending epoll_ctl | Node.js: pending callbacks phase
PHASE 4 timer expiry | Node.js: timers phase (setTimeout/setInterval)
PHASE 3 deferred tasks | Node.js: process.nextTick() queue
nextTick drains BETWEEN phases — highest priority deferred mechanism
dispatching=1 during Phase 1 only — all epoll_ctl deferred to Phase 2
deferred tasks see ALL Phase 1 + Phase 4 side-effects before running
snapshot trick: tasks queued IN Phase 3 run next tick, not this one
timer cancel in deferred task takes effect before next Phase 4
EPOLLOUT busy-loop impossible: disarmed in Phase 2 after write drain

text.tspan: deferred tasks runs in NEXT tick

g.text: epoll_ctl() calls execute NOW — safe, no active iteration
